profile.name: Dr. Researcher
profile.title: Lead Scientist at Quantum Institute | Condensed Matter Physicist
profile.about: Passionate researcher with 10+ years of experience bridging the gap between artificial intelligence and quantum computing. Focus on accelerating material discovery using NISQ devices.

publications.title: Quantum Neural Networks for Material Discovery
publications.abstract: A novel architecture combining quantum circuits with classical deep learning to model solid-state systems.

feed.author: James Wilson
feed.content: I'm looking for experts in dynamical decoupling algorithms to provide rapid feedback on a manuscript before we submit to PRL. Please DM if interested.

feed.author: Elena Rodriguez
feed.content: Excited to share our latest high-resolution tunneling spectra dataset for BaFe2As2. Hope this helps the community model the superconducting gap more accurately.

attachment.title: Tunneling_Spectra_BaFe2As2_2026.zip
attachment.desc: Contains .csv files of dI/dV measurements at varied temperatures (4K - 100K) and magnetic fields (0T - 14T).
